subject: Input: ad7879 - add check for read errors in interrupt

features.path_conditions: any call site where the int return value is discarded; subsequent code depends on read buffer being valid
features.fit_test_reasoning: regmap_bulk_read returns an int error code that callers must inspect before relying on the read buffer. The bug is the canonical missing-check pattern: call without examining the return value. Post-operation here is an error-check guard rather than a release call, fitting the missing-check variant of the four-features schema.
